hooks.command: COMMAND=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && pnpm test:unit --passWithNoTests; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/backend/src/.*\.spec\.ts$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && pnpm test:unit --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/backend/src/.*\.integration\.spec\.ts$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/backend && pnpm test:integration 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/frontend/src/.*\.test\.tsx?$ ]]; then cd /Users/wang/Desktop/Varogo/apps/frontend && pnpm test 2>&1 | tail -10; fi
FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ apps/backend/src/.*\.ts$ ]]; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
